title: microcos mortehanii
intro: Microcos mortehanii, also known as the Pokok Rengas or Rengas tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Microcos mortehanii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential use as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
